name: Howard

base_stats.notable: Lowest Attack (1361) of researched Epics — defensive tank archetype.

conquest.name: Shielded Strike
conquest.description: Howard gives an enemy a solid whack with his heavy shield, knocking the target back while dealing AOE damage.

counters.reason: No public source documents explicit hero-vs-hero counter matchups for Kingshot. Community discussions reference troop-type rock-paper-scissors (Infantry > Cavalry > Archer > Infantry) and formation-based counters but not specific hero counters. Check Discord/Reddit for player-tested matchups.

garrison.reasoning: Garrison only. Quickly outclassed by Gen 2+ heroes.

lore_background.title: The Guardian with the Plank-Shield
lore_background.backstory: Howard served as a guardsman of the Sixth Imperial Cavalry, defending the Imperial Palace during a rebellion. Afterward he faced political persecution and was imprisoned. His friend Gordon — then working as a prison chef — broke him out using a spatula. Howard fled to a small village, where he became chief sentry. When a rebel attack came, he defended the village using improvised plank defenses, earning the nickname 'the guardian with the plank-shield.'
lore_background.cross_reference: Howard + Gordon — Gordon broke Howard out of prison with a spatula. Inter-hero lore pair.

deep_analysis: Howard is the early garrison tank of Kingshot — a Gen 1 Epic Infantry hero whose kit is built around shield-based defense. Shielded Strike deals up to Attack × 280% AOE with knockback, Joint Defense buffs all heroes' Defense by +15%, and Shield Block reduces his own damage taken by +30%. His Expedition skills extend the defense to the whole army: Defenders' Edge reduces all troops' damage taken by +20%, and Weaken reduces enemy squads' Attack by +20%. No exclusive gear (Epic pattern). F2P-accessible through 4 methods. heroes.js tier: B Garrison only — quickly outclassed by Gen 2+ heroes, but a reliable early pick. His lore is one of two inter-hero pairs in the roster: he was a Sixth Imperial Cavalry guardsman imprisoned after a rebellion for political reasons, and his friend Gordon — working as a prison chef — broke him out using a spatula. He became a village chief sentry and earned the nickname 'the guardian with the plank-shield' after defending against a rebel attack with improvised plank defenses.
unverified_fields: skill_priority, gear_build, named_pairs, counters, shard_cost — all null

handbook_meta.description: Howard provides the foundational damage reduction layer (effect_op 111) for triple effect_op compositions. His 20% damage reduction multiplies with Gordon's Health (113) and Saul's Defense (112), enabling 2.18x+ DefenseUp—21% better than pure same-category stacking.

handbook_build_guide_note: Handbook lists 'Cavalry Commander' (Cavalry march speed) skill not found in kingshotwiki. Possible different skill list or different naming. Skills cross-reference only.
